data: {"delta": "Before any context\u2011compaction step occurs, any exact tool outputs (and the decisions made from them) that exist only in the chat transcript must first be **archived verbatim**\u2014i.e., saved unchanged in long\u2011term memory (or another persistent store) so the precise wording and data are preserved even after the chat history is trimmed or compressed.
